reviews.review_msg: thoroughly enjoyed the class... not for you if you don't like math.. very smart teacher and is very helpful if he thinks you're worth his time
Excellent class!  You can tell he's a really smart guy, but he did a great job of "dumbing it down" for this 1st-year class.  Very enthusiastic about his work.  Loved the class!
I think he's one of the most interesting math prof at SFU. I loved his digression on the history of math. If you hate him, that's because you aren't interested in math enough.
his lectures always go off topic. He teaches math for maybe 5 minutes and strays towards other topics totally unrelated to math..his midterms were fine..final was hard..but crappy lecturer

Easiest prof ever.  Midterms and final were easier than homework (which was also easy).      Average on midterms/final should have been much higher!  Kind of boring, but a good prof to get an easy A with...
This guys was absolutely boring.  He brought in Maple to every lecture and blabbed on and on about it even though we couldn't use it on the assignments or lectures.
he goes off on tangets to nowhere but his examples are good, notes suck. somehow manages to tangle himself in his own mike EVERY class.
notes were okay, good examples, good consistency with tests etc.
